title: Agent Interaction Policy Response
description: Resolved interaction-policy payload for the authenticated agent/persona contract.

schema_version.description: Stable response-shape label for interaction-policy resolution.

profile.description: Resolved persona profile after combining stored, session, and default signals.

policy_text.description: Canonical instruction text the agent should follow for this interaction.

question_budget.description: How many clarifying questions the agent should ask before acting.

options_max.description: Maximum number of explicit options the agent should present at once.

jargon_level.description: Preferred terminology level for the user-facing explanation.

next_skill_hint.description: Optional follow-on skill hint for the calling agent.

fallback_policy.description: Static fallback family used when richer personalization is unavailable.
